canvas.name: Life cell (from primitives)
canvas.description: Conway's Game of Life cell rebuilt from primitives, tiled into a 3x3 toroidal grid. Each cell is the four-piece recipe: Tick (period) + State (Conway rule + report emit) + ReportFan (broadcast to 8 neighbors) + Agg (Aggregator n=8). The State node holds `alive`; the Aggregator's `total(sum)` triggers the B3/S23 update.
